notes: GET /health returned 404 on this validation server, so liveness was confirmed via /ping per repo contract coverage.

evidence.test: tests/ohlcv-worker-state.test.ts > extends retained history depth when targetHistoryDays increases
evidence.details: Target history days increased from 90 to 180 and persisted row targetHistoryDays became 180.

evidence.test: tests/ohlcv-gap-repair.test.ts > identifies interior missing windows with correct boundaries and slot counts
evidence.details: Gap descriptors included 2026-03-21 and 2026-03-23 with missingSlotCount 1 for each.

test: tests/ohlcv-gap-repair.test.ts > repairs gaps by fetching and persisting missing candles so re-detection is clean
tests/ohlcv-runtime.test.ts > uses the runtime sync path to repair interior gaps once upstream eventually serves the missing window
evidence.details: Gap repair persisted missing candles and follow-up detection returned no gaps.

test: tests/ohlcv-runtime.test.ts > continues from persisted cursors after restart
tests/ohlcv-runtime.test.ts > leases the next eligible target after a restart when an earlier target is still in backoff
evidence.details: Restarted runtime resumed from persisted latestSyncedAt and advanced to the next eligible target when prior work remained in backoff.

test: tests/ohlcv-worker-state.test.ts > records failure metadata with exponential backoff
tests/ohlcv-worker-state.test.ts > resets backoff and returns failed targets to idle after a successful sync
evidence.details: Failure count advanced to 2 and nextRetryAt became failedAt + 10 minutes; later success reset failureCount and nextRetryAt.

Fresh :memory: server on port 3102 returned the canonical persisted seven-day close series for bitcoin with 7 daily buckets from 1773446400000 through 1773964800000, confirming the endpoint is serving persisted history on current HEAD.

Fresh :memory: server on port 3102 returned 7 persisted OHLC tuples with distinct open/high/low/close values (for example 77815/80896/76788/79000 on the first row), proving the endpoint uses canonical OHLCV candles rather than synthesizing from close prices.

evidence.test: tests/ohlcv-gap-repair.test.ts > prunes candles older than the configured retention window
evidence.details: Retention enforcement on a 500-day series removed older candles and left 365 retained rows starting at 2025-03-28T00:00:00.000Z.
HTTP response exposed the required top100, targets, and lag objects with non-negative numeric values, and targeted diagnostics tests passed.

evidence.test: tests/ohlcv-worker-state.test.ts > leases top100 targets before long-tail targets
evidence.details: leaseNextOhlcvTarget returned the top100 bitcoin target before the long-tail target.

frictions: GET /health still returned 404 on the validation server, so /ping remained the effective liveness probe for API validation.
